title: LDT4SSC Pilot Update
description: Schema for a structured update record published in an LDT4SSC pilot repository.

schema_version.description: The version of the update schema this record follows.

type.description: The kind of update being published.

date.description: The date the update is published, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

title.description: Short, descriptive title of the update.

tags.description: Topic tags drawn from the LDT4SSC thematic list. Optional but encouraged.

work_strand.description: The LDT4SSC work strand this update relates to.

authors.description: The contributor(s) who authored this update.

related_assets.description: Optional links to related assets, repositories, or external resources.

related_event.description: Optional reference to an event (for type=event records).
